texto: True friends are like our favorite books on a shelf in our home that we look at everyday and continue to read over and over till we learn all we can about them. We never get rid of them, we just keep them to share and cherish our whole life. Some we share with many people but there are those that become our exclusive favorites that we keep in a small group, separated from all the others to learn from and enjoy forever ! Original quote form Doug Prentice
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Doug Prentice: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “True friends are like our favorite books on a shelf in our home that we look at everyday and cont…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, friendship-quotes, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
